summary: Rebuilt main from the dev runtime tree using the repository promotion workflow.
Fixed allowlist omissions required by CI Main Runtime and preserved the custom Woonggon Kim license.
not_changed: No cleanup of local artifact noise in the original working tree.
validations: Inspected failed CI Main Runtime logs.
Verified required helper and script files in the regenerated main runtime tree.
Verified LICENSE, README.md, and package.json license metadata.
risks: Future runtime promotions still depend on allowlist upkeep.
The license must remain part of the promotion path going forward.
recommendation: Keep main-runtime-allowlist.txt aligned with CI Main Runtime dependencies and preserve the root LICENSE in future promotions.
